_meta.note: Daemon-backed rule activation. scope is REQUIRED: it is present in the MCP input schema required[] (TB-5), so an omitted scope is rejected at the wire-form boundary and is never silently widened to global. This fixture uses explicit global scope. TB-7: scope.kind is a JSON-Schema enum [global,bucket,job,probe] and the bucket_id/job_id/probe_id fields carry opaque-id format notes (copy verbatim, e.g. bkt_/job_/prb_<32hex>) so the first call picks a legal shape.

invariants: scope is required and present in the MCP input schema required[] (TB-5)
version is optional (omit to activate the latest stored version)
an omitted scope is rejected, never silently widened to global
jobs_rebound is a count, not job output
